task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Add Friend' section of the Flight Crew View app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Flight Crew View app open to a screen or dialog titled 'Add Friend' or containing friend-adding functionality.

task_completion.description: Enter the malformed email input into the Add Friend text field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'this-is-not-an-email' is visible in the input field for adding a friend.

task_completion.description: Trigger and display the error message for the malformed email input.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An error message (popup, toast, or inline text) is visible on the screen after attempting to submit 'this-is-not-an-email'.

task_completion.description: Enter the non-existent user email into the Add Friend text field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ghost_user_999@example.com' is visible in the input field for adding a friend.

task_completion.description: Trigger and display the error message for the non-existent user input.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An error message (popup, toast, or inline text) is visible on the screen after attempting to submit 'ghost_user_999@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Save the documented error messages to /sdcard/error_comparison.txt with the required headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/sdcard/error_comparison.txt'. The file must contain the exact headers 'Malformed Input Error:' and 'Non-existent User Error:' followed by the respective error messages observed in the app.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View application to generate the errors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Flight Crew View GUI being used to input the test cases, rather than the agent just using terminal commands or guessing the errors.

integrity.description: The error messages saved in the text file match the actual errors displayed in the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text recorded in the final output file corresponds exactly to the error text seen in the app's error popups/messages in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not create the output file without first triggering the errors in the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory must show the app interaction and error generation steps occurring chronologically before the creation and saving of the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). The malformed input to test is 'this-is-not-an-email'. The non-existent user input to test is 'ghost_user_999@example.com'. The output must be saved to '/sdcard/error_comparison.txt' and must include the exact headers 'Malformed Input Error:' and 'Non-existent User Error:'.
